title: Password Gen
helpOutput:
Usage: password-gen [<options>]

  Generate cryptographically secure random passwords.

Options:
  --json               Output results in JSON format
  -s, --server=<text>  DNS server to query (default: system resolver)
  -t, --timeout=<int>  Query timeout in seconds
  -l, --length=<int>   Password length
  -c, --count=<int>    Number of passwords to generate
  --no-uppercase       Exclude uppercase letters
  --no-lowercase       Exclude lowercase letters
  --no-digits          Exclude digits
  --no-special         Exclude special characters
  --chars=<text>       Custom character set to use
  -h, --help           Show this message and exit
output:
Character set size: 88
Entropy per password: 77.5 bits
Strength: Moderate

[
  {
    "#": "1",
    "Password": "",
    "Length": "12",
    "Entropy": "77.5 bits"

    "Entropy": "77.5 bits"
  }
